visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women in white dresses are kneeling in a Costco warehouse aisle surrounded by blue and yellow boxes of laundry products. They smile and hold bottles of blue scent beads while looking directly at the camera. (2) The scene shifts to a well-lit indoor living room where the women sit behind a table featuring the product. One woman wears a zebra-patterned bucket hat and makes heart gestures. (3) A sequence shows the woman in the hat reacting with exaggerated disgust to a pile of smelly clothes. Overlays of cartoon characters appear. (4) A close-up highlights a yellow stain on the fabric of a white dress, followed by the other woman in the kitchen area looking frustrated. (5) In a close-up, blue and white laundry beads are poured from a plastic bottle into a blue dosing cap. The camera then shows the beads and white garments being placed into a white front-loading washing machine. (6) The women reappear in the living room, hugging clean white towels and smiling as digital flower petals fall around them. (7) A closet is shown filled with neatly organized, clean clothes. The final shot shows the women holding the product bottles and gesturing toward the camera in a promotional pose.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 之前買到缺貨的. (2) [Variety]: 明星商品 回來了!!. (3) [Subtitle]: 好市多才有的. [Variety]: 蘭諾衣物芳香豆. (4) [Slogan]: 最強蘭諾 衣物芳香豆. (5) [Subtitle]: 這款抗臭外還抗黃. (6) [Subtitle]: 像妹愛穿白色衣服的. [Variety]: 更不能錯過. (7) [Subtitle]: 謝謝你買給我. [Variety]: 好! 再買幾罐!. (8) [Subtitle]: 夏天最害怕的就是. [Variety]: 流汗衣服會臭. (9) [Subtitle]: 不然就是下雨天. [Subtitle]: 衣服沒曬乾的悶臭味. (10) [Variety]: 真的很可怕. [Logo]: 臭. (11) [Subtitle]: 還有啊!! 像是重要日子要出門. (12) [Variety]: 有不明黃漬!. (13) [Subtitle]: 寧願整件都染黃 也不要白裡一點黃. (14) [Subtitle]: 洗衣服真的要擔心好多事. [Subtitle]: 但只要洗衣 多一步加入. (15) [Slogan]: 最強蘭諾 抗黃抗菌芳香豆. (16) [Variety]: 一次OUT! 煩惱說掰掰. (17) [Subtitle]: 最強的原因就是它有. [Variety]: 添加抗氧化成分. (18) [Variety]: 防護罩. (19) [Subtitle]: 預防衣服泛黃. (20) [Subtitle]: 衣服不僅能長時間清香. [Variety]: 抗黃 抗臭 抗菌 一次搞定. (21) [Variety]: 衣櫃乾淨清香. (22) [Subtitle]: 放在衣櫃多久都不怕!. (23) [Subtitle]: 不論是否下雨. [Variety]: 衣服都不用重洗!. (24) [Subtitle]: 果然是好市多獨家. [Variety]: 最強蘭諾帶回家.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young Asian women; one has long black hair and wears a white tiered off-shoulder dress, the other has short black hair, wears a zebra-pattern bucket hat, a black choker, and a similar white off-shoulder dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse aisles with industrial shelving and bulk product boxes; a modern living room with a gray table, a beige sofa, and shelves with collectibles; a laundry area with a white front-loading washing machine.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo electronic dance music with a strong synthesizer beat starts immediately. A male narrator delivers high-energy promotional speech. A sharp whoosh SFX punctuates the first visual transition. (2) Female voices exclaim excitedly with high pitch variability. The BGM remains consistent in volume and tempo. A percussive 'ding' sound effect emphasizes a text overlay. (3) The female voice shifts to a comical, distressed tone, mimicking a scream. This is followed by a dry, plastic rattling sound representing the scent beads being poured. (4) Acoustic textures shift slightly as the sound of a washing machine door latching is heard. The narrator's voice maintains an authoritative yet friendly professional cadence. (5) The BGM swells with a brighter tonal quality as the female voices return to a joyful, high-arousal tone. Digital bubble SFX are layered over the closing sequence. (6) Final phase features a rapid sequence of chime-like sound effects synced with brand logo appearances, maintaining a high spectral brightness until the track cuts out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Problem -> Product Introduction -> Evidence -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a high-energy advertisement for Lenor scent beads, specifically highlighting their availability at Costco. It uses a problem-solution narrative, identifying summer sweat and yellow stains as common laundry pain points, then demonstrating the product's effectiveness in providing long-lasting fragrance and preventing discoloration through 'anti-oxidation' technology.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product showcasing, brand name mentions in titles/audio, and clear call to action to buy the product at Costco.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a classic 'social-media variety show' style with dense text overlays and sound effects to maintain high viewer engagement.
